- **`Cargo.toml`** / **`Cargo.lock`** - Rust package manifest and lock file
- **`crates/`** - Contains the individual crates (runtime, CLI, etc.)
- **`target/`** - Build artifacts directory
- **`scripts/`** - Utility scripts
- Several markdown documentation files (README, USAGE, PARITY, etc.)
- Various config directories (`.claude/`, `.claw/`, `.omc/`)
